allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Price:', j.price, '| Change:', j.priceChange?.toFixed\(2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\){console.log\('ERROR:',j.error\)}else{console.log\('ATM IV:',j.atmIV,'| Expirations:',j.expirationDates?.length,'| Options entries:',j.options?.length,'| First expiry calls:',j.options?.[0]?.calls?.length\);}")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\){console.log\('ERROR:',j.error\)}else{console.log\('Closes:',j.closes?.length,'| Last close:',j.closes?.slice\(-1\)[0]\);}" kill %1)
